Meta.title: AirArrival · Iași
Meta.description: Your personalized welcome to Iași — events, culture, food, wine and how to get into the city, right when you land.

Events.title: Events & tickets
Events.subtitle: What's on in Iași tonight — events, culture, food and wine.

Welcome.subtitle: Everything you need from the moment you land — track your bag, get into the city, and discover Iași.

Bag.title: My bag
Bag.subtitle: Tracked from drop-off to the belt — every airline, one place.

live.notFoundSub: The link may be old or the tag number is wrong.

wait.title: While you're here
wait.subtitle: Open and nearby right now — make the wait count.

scan.title: Scan your bag tag
scan.hint: Point the camera at the barcode on the tag the airline gave you. No app, no sign-up.
scan.noCamera: Camera not available — enter the number below
scan.cameraError: Couldn't open the camera. Enter the number instead.

Bag.notFoundSub: Check the 10-digit number on your bag tag and try again.
Bag.errorSub: You may be offline. We'll keep trying.

headline.in_air: Your bag is flying with you
headline.on_belt: Your bag is on the belt
headline.delayed: Your bag is running a little late

reason.linked: We've linked your bag. We'll follow every step from here.
reason.checked_in: Dropped at the counter, waiting to be loaded.
reason.in_air: It's in the hold of your flight — nothing to do but relax.
reason.connection_ok: It changed planes on time. The hardest part is done.
reason.arrived: It landed with you and is being unloaded.
reason.arrivedEta: About {eta} min until it reaches the belt.
reason.onBelt: Bags here usually take ~12 min. Yours is ready.
reason.delayed: It's taking longer than usual. Here's how we'll help.

Home.personalized: Personalized by your arrival time and what's nearby
Home.forYouSub: Based on your interests and arrival time
Home.discoverSub: Handpicked for tonight, based on your interests.
Home.emptySub: Try removing a filter to see more.

Detail.reservedMsg: Demo booking confirmed — added to your trip.

Transport.title: Getting to Iași
Transport.subtitle: From Iași Airport (IAS) to the city center · ~8 km
Transport.rentalTitle: These companies operate at our airport — click to access them directly.
